title: Translating XPath to CSS Selector
scenario: Translate the following XPath expression into a CSS selector that targets the same elements on a web page. The XPath is: //div[@class='container']/p[@id='text']. The result should be a CSS selector that targets the paragraph with the id 'text' inside the container div.
constraints: Must use CSS selectors for styling the element
Must target the paragraph with id 'text'

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the translated CSS selector targets the same elements as the original XPath.
Assess the readability and clarity of the translated CSS selector.
